concerns: Integration test (step 6) must mock collectSnapshot() — jsdom lacks WebGL support, so collectRenderingSignals() will fail. Plan should specify vi.mock() for the snapshot module.

isMissing helper must not treat false or 0 as missing — these are valid signal values (e.g. touchSupport: false). Plan should explicitly note that only string sentinels, null, undefined, and empty string are missing.
